element.hint: Field to use for the X-axis in chart visualizations
element.label: X-Axis Field
element.name: src_x_field

element.hint: JSON object of parameters to pass to the method
element.label: Parameters (JSON)
element.name: src_params

element.hint: Maximum number of results to return (0 = unlimited)
element.label: Result Limit
element.name: src_limit

element.hint: The field to apply the aggregate function to (required for SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX)
element.label: Aggregate Field
element.name: src_aggregate_field

element.hint: Optional secondary field for nested grouping
element.label: Secondary Group By
element.name: src_group_by_2

element.hint: Source field for relationship/flow visualizations (e.g., Sankey, Network)
element.label: Source Field
element.name: src_source_field

element.hint: Filter conditions to apply to the staging table
element.label: Staging Filter
element.name: src_staged_filter

element.hint: Target field for relationship/flow visualizations (e.g., Sankey, Network)
element.label: Target Field
element.name: src_target_field

element.hint: Primary field to group results by
element.label: Group By
element.name: src_group_by

element.hint: The staging table containing pre-loaded external data
element.label: Staging Table
element.name: src_staged_table

element.hint: Method to call on the script include class
element.label: Method Name
element.name: src_method

element.hint: Field to sort results by
element.label: Order By
element.name: src_order_by

element.hint: Number of days of historical data to retrieve
element.label: Lookback Days
element.name: src_lookback_days

element.hint: Field in the staging table to use as the display label
element.label: Label Field
element.name: src_label_field

element.hint: The Performance Analytics indicator to pull data from
element.label: PA Indicator
element.name: src_indicator

element.hint: Field in the staging table to use as the numeric value
element.label: Value Field
element.name: src_value_field

element.hint: API name of the script include class to invoke (e.g., x_1295779_metpo.MyHandler)
element.label: Script Include
element.name: src_script_include

element.hint: The table to aggregate data from
element.label: Source Table
element.name: src_table

element.hint: The breakdown dimension for the PA indicator data
element.label: PA Breakdown
element.name: src_breakdown

element.hint: Comma-separated list of specific breakdown element sys_ids to include
element.label: Breakdown Elements
element.name: src_elements

element.hint: Encoded query filter to limit records from the source table
element.label: Filter Conditions
element.name: src_filter

element.hint: Field to use for the Y-axis in chart visualizations
element.label: Y-Axis Field
element.name: src_y_field

element.hint: The aggregate operation to perform on records
element.label: Aggregate Function
element.name: src_aggregate
